# Plan and Implement

## Change Summary

{"change_summary":"Implemented the remediation for `ralph pr open` safety gaps in `src/contexts/bead_workflow/pr_open.rs`: added an `origin/master` ancestry guard before soft-reset, changed commit inspection from subjects to full commit messages, validates checkpoint commits with the shared checkpoint metadata parser against the active project and latest run id, and rejects unstaged/untracked real-code changes outside `.ralph-burning/` before reset. Extended mockable `PrToolPort` coverage and unit tests for advanced master ancestry, checkpoint-prefixed commits without metadata, checkpoints from another run, and dirty real-code worktrees.","outstanding_risks":[],"steps":[{"description":"Reviewed existing `pr_open` implementation, checkpoint metadata parser, and mock-port test patterns to target the pending amendments without widening scope.","order":0,"status":"completed"},{"description":"Added mockable port methods for `origin/master` ancestry, full commit-message retrieval, and unstag
